themeName: Sundown Spirits: Craft Cocktail Discovery at Sea

visual.aestheticLabel: Modern aperitif at sea: glassware sparkle, lowlight glow, horizon-first

typographyDirection.headlineStyle: High-contrast serif with elegant aperture; generous tracking for air and calm.
typographyDirection.bodyStyle: Clean humanist sans with subtle warmth; comfortable for mobile reading.

visual.imageryMood: Blue-hour serenity with a warm edgeâocean horizon, teak hints, and a single refined glass catching the last sun.
visual.lightingStyle: Golden hour tipping into nautical blue; soft practicals and specular highlights on glass, no hard flash; candle-level pools inboard, sky-lit gradients on deck.
visual.compositionNotes: Keep ship/ocean primary: rail lines, wake texture, negative space sky. One to two human silhouettes max, relaxed posture facing the horizon. Glassware as accent, not centerpieceâon a teak table by a window, or in-hand near the rail. Minimal garnish, no clutter, no bar tool spreads. Avoid busy tabletops and crowd clusters.
avoidList: Grid tasting mats with rows of tiny pours
Whiteboards, flip charts, or visible instruction signage
Lanyards, table tents, or branded backdrops in focus
Overhead product-flatlay of tools and bottles
Bartender performing flair as hero moment
Giant logo walls or promo banners
referenceMoodboard: Blue-hour ocean horizon with warm rim light on glass
Teak table by a window; single coupe catching sunset
Oasis-class open deck lines at dusk (subtle, no signage)
Central Park at twilightâfoliage silhouettes, soft globes
Close-up citrus twist over a lowball with big cubeâspecular pop

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: Let the craft-cocktail flavor ride inside normal cruise rhythmsâbrief story-led touches within regular bar service, never a class or staged competition.
cruiseNativeMoments: Sailaway toast on the open deck at golden hour
Pre-dinner drinks along the Royal Promenade or Central Park at twilight
Quiet after-dinner lounge linger with digestivos
Late-night bar drift with low conversation and ocean-through-glass views
nicheEnhancedMoments: A bartender offers a three-pour mini flight with a palm-sized story cardâguests linger as long as they like.
A garnish trolley passes before dinner with citrus peels and herbsâone table chooses an amaro spritz.
Menu sections group pours by flavor journey (Citrus & Bitter, Herbal & Dry) without ceremony.
Blue-hour Negroni riffs rotate behind the bar; guests sample a small variant alongside their usual order.
A light, optional passport stamp at purchaseâkept small and playful, no tracking boards.
implausibleLiteralizations: Technique workshops with whiteboards or exams
Bartender certification or formal coursework onboard
Guest flair competitions with rehearsals or judges
Lab-style setups with beakers, pipettes, or refractometers
Spittoons and tasting grids dominating tables
allowedProps: Elegant stemware and classic lowballs with a single clear cube
Citrus peels, olive picks, minimal herbs
Slim garnish trolley, cloth napkins, cut-crystal water carafes
Small passport stamp on a personal keepsake card
discouragedProps: Spittoons, plastic tasting mats, numbered flight grids
Smoking guns, sous-vide rigs, or vacuum chambers on display
Scales, lab glass, droppers, test tubes
Clipboards, score sheets, or clipboard badges
Tripods, ring lights, or camera rigs near guests

messaging.heroSlogan: Sundown Spirits: Craft Cocktail Discovery at Sea
messaging.subSlogan: Golden hour, glassware sparkle, and easy discovery sips aboard Utopia of the Seas.
messaging.elevatorPitch: Sundown Spirits folds modern aperitif energy into the moments you already love at seaâsailaway, sunset, pre-dinner, and the unhurried nightcap. Bars operate normally, with one thoughtful flight or riff highlighted each day and tiny story cues that make a pour feel special. Think low-ABV welcomes on deck, a simple three-pour sunset taste at The Lime & Coconut with a quick origin note, a three-venue dinner path with petite pairings if your evening wanders that way, and late-night Negroni variations drifting through the menu. Dip in when it suits you, share a favorite, then wander back to the horizon.
messaging.voicePersona: A calm, well-traveled bar friendâpart head bartender, part deckside travel writerâwho knows when to let the ocean talk.

merch.conceptStatement: Playful, print-first tees that bottle blue-hour calm and aperitif witâgraphic line art, two-ink sunsets, and tiny garnish cues that feel cruise-native, not clubby.

coreItem.colorway: Navy shirt; inks in grapefruit (#FF715A) and champagne (#F6E7C9).

merch.logoConceptDescription: High-contrast serif wordmark âSundown Spiritsâ with a split grapefruit-to-navy gradient kiss on the S terminals and a one-stroke coupe-over-horizon underline.

audio.ambientNarrationScript: Blue hour settles over the rail. A glass catches the last ember of sun. Citrus lifts, ice whispers, and the sea draws a clean horizon. Order what you love, taste something new, and let the evening unspoolâone story, one sip, all ocean.
audio.hypeClipScript: Golden hour. A quiet clink. Three small pours and a big view. Spritz at sailaway, a sunset flight at The Lime & Coconut, and night drifting into Negroni riffsâeasy, unhurried, exactly when you want it. Sundown Spirits. Craft Cocktail Discovery at Sea.
audio.voiceProfile: Warm, gender-neutral, mid-low register with relaxed confidence; paced like an after-dinner story, smile audible, no hard sell.
audio.musicMood: Modern aperitivo loungeâsoft nu-jazz and bossa brushes, understated vibraphone, gentle congas, and blue-hour synth pads; tempo 86â98 BPM, never clubby.

tiktokOrganic.hook: Golden hour looks different at sea.

narrative.title: Two silhouettes, one horizon
narrative.scriptOrNarration: Golden hour. A quiet clink. Ocean doing most of the talking. Order what you loveâtaste something new if it finds you. Sundown Spirits aboard Utopia of the Seas.
narrative.visualDirectionNotes: Start on rail lines and wake texture at blue hour; two guests leaning shoulder-to-shoulder, faces turned to horizon. A coupe glints at frame edge for a beat, never center. Glide past Central Park foliage glow; end on sea meeting sky. No talking head, no stagingâworld-built by ship architecture and posture.
narrative.backgroundDescription: Open deck starboard rail at sunset; pass through a windowed corridor; emerge near Central Park at twilight on Utopia of the Seas.
narrative.musicMood: Soft nu-jazz with bossa brushes at ~92 BPM; light vibraphone accents.

tiktokOrganic.caption: Sundown Spirits on Utopia of the Seas. Blue hour, glassware sparkle, ocean first. Dip in when it feels right.

instagramReels.visualConcept: One-take drift: windowed corridor into Central Park twilight. A slim garnish trolley rolls by at a distance, a tiny story card peeks out, and distant ocean light threads through glassâarchitecture and motion are the hero.
instagramReels.audioTrackType: Original sound: nu-jazz lounge 90 BPM, understated congas
instagramReels.caption: Modern aperitif energy woven into the night you already love. Utopia of the Seas, blue hour edition. No rushâjust horizon-led sips.

carouselSlides.headline: Sundown, Then the Sea
carouselSlides.bodyText: The horizon calls the shots. We add a quiet clink.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Negative-space sky over the wake; guests as soft silhouettes at the railâno glass centered.

carouselSlides.headline: Tiny Story, Big View
carouselSlides.bodyText: A palm-sized note rides with your pourâread it or donât. The oceanâs still the headline.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Teak table by a window; corner of a discreet story card, glass off to the side with warm rim light.

carouselSlides.headline: Twilight in Central Park
carouselSlides.bodyText: Soft globes, foliage shadows, and a low-ABV hello before dinner.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Central Park walkway at dusk, bokeh lanterns, couple strolling in step; no drinks visible.

carouselSlides.headline: Citrus, Not Circus
carouselSlides.bodyText: A single twist over clear ice. No flair, no fussâjust flavor.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Close crop of a citrus peel mid-air; ocean gradient through the window in soft focus.

carouselSlides.headline: Night Drifts Easy
carouselSlides.bodyText: Negroni riffs come and go. Stay with your favorite or try a cousin.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Bar backlit in blue hour; bartenderâs hands slide a lowball into edge of frameâglass not dominating.

instagramFeed.singlePostConcept: Side-by-side loungers by the wake, matching Sundown tee peeks from a light layer; both watching the line of sea and skyâno drinks in frame.
instagramFeed.caption: Sundown Spirits on Utopia of the Seas. Golden hour, one clever pour. Ocean first, always.

facebookAd.primaryText: Golden hour, glassware sparkle, and easy story-led sipsâwoven into the moments you already love at sea. Order what you love; try a quiet riff if it finds you. Ocean forward, unhurried.
facebookAd.description: Reserve your cabin for horizon-led evenings.

youtubeShort.description: Golden hour. A quiet clink. Three small pours and a big view. Sundown Spirits folds modern aperitif energy into the rhythms of Utopia of the Seasâdip in when it feels right.

emailHeader.subjectLine: Sundown Spirits sets sail on Utopia of the Seas
emailHeader.preheader: Golden hour, one clever pourâno schedule, just good timing.
emailHeader.bodyDirection: Short, ocean-led note inviting guests to enjoy low-ABV welcomes at sailaway, a quiet sunset taste at The Lime & Coconut, and late-night riffs when the mood strikesâoptional, story-led, unrushed.
emailHeader.visualDirection: Full-bleed horizon at blue hour with a rim-lit glass near the edge; high-contrast serif headline and warm sans body; accent grapefruit dot over the sea line.

discordBanner.serverBannerDescription: Blue-hour wake line with subtle âSundown Spiritsâ wordmark; soft specular highlightsâno glass hero, no promo wall.
discordBanner.welcomeMessageDirection: Pinned welcome: ocean-first vibe, optional share-your-spritz thread, and a calm reminderâorder what you love, taste something new if it finds you. No schedules, just good timing.

heroExplainer.title: Sundown Spirits: What It Feels Like
heroExplainer.scriptOrNarration: Blue hour settles over the rail. A glass catches the last ember of sun. Citrus lifts, ice whispers, and the sea draws a clean horizon. Order what you love, taste something new, and let the evening unspoolâone story, one sip, all ocean. Sundown Spirits on Utopia of the Seas.
heroExplainer.visualDirectionNotes: Cut between: rail lines and wake texture; Central Park globes; The Lime & Coconut sign glowing at dusk; a discreet story note set beside a low-ABV welcome; two guests trading a quiet smile. Glassware appears as accent only. No hosts, no staging, no crowd clusters.
heroExplainer.backgroundDescription: Real onboard spacesâopen deck, windowed lounges, Central Park, The Lime & Coconutâshot at golden hour into nautical blue on Utopia of the Seas.
heroExplainer.musicMood: Modern aperitivo loungeâsoft nu-jazz, vibraphone, gentle congas at ~90 BPM.

tiktokSeed.visualDirectionNotes: Three-beat punch: 1) Horizon gradient and shipâs rail; 2) Slow citrus twist over a big cube, glass at frame edge; 3) Two silhouettes walking in step through Central Park. End card: Sundown Spirits â¢ Utopia of the Seas.

thresholdAnnouncement.title: Sundown Begins
thresholdAnnouncement.scriptOrNarration: Golden hour is calling. Sundown Spirits is aboard Utopia of the Seasâocean first, easy sips when the mood finds you.
thresholdAnnouncement.visualDirectionNotes: Wake line and sky; quick peek of garnish trolley gliding past; couple at the rail. Text overlays in high-contrast serif with generous tracking. No dates or schedules, just mood.
thresholdAnnouncement.backgroundDescription: Open deck and Central Park at twilight; soft interior practicals visible through glass.

merchReveal.musicMood: Playful lounge riff with a light vibraphone motif.

countdownSeries.title: Tâ4: Rail Ritual
countdownSeries.scriptOrNarration: Two seats. One horizon. Thatâs the plan.
countdownSeries.visualDirectionNotes: Posture cue: side-by-side lean at the rail; no drinks visible. Hold on the wake as the ship breathes.
countdownSeries.backgroundDescription: Aft deck wake view at blue hour on Utopia of the Seas.

countdownSeries.title: Tâ3: Citrus Drift
countdownSeries.scriptOrNarration: A twist, a whisper, and the sea.

countdownSeries.musicMood: Soft congas and brushed snare, intimate.

countdownSeries.musicMood: Warm vibraphone phrases over a calm groove.
